title: Box Drawing & Block Symbols: Copy & Paste ─ │ ┌ █ ▓ ASCII Boxes
meta_description: Copy and paste box drawing and block element symbols — lines, corners, double borders, full blocks, and shading characters for ASCII boxes. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Lines, corners, double borders, and shaded blocks for building text boxes and ASCII art. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Box drawing and block element characters let you build frames, tables, and ASCII art in plain text. This library gathers the single-line pieces and corners, the double and heavy border variants, and the full and partial blocks used for shading and bar graphs — all plain Unicode characters you can copy into terminals, code comments, and posts.
